title: Calculate Data Center PUE
description: Algorithm to calculate Power Usage Effectiveness for a data center
code:
// Calculate PUE (Power Usage Effectiveness)
ALGORITHM CalculatePUE
INPUT: TotalFacilityEnergy, ITEquipmentEnergy
OUTPUT: PUEValue

BEGIN
 // Validate inputs
 IF ITEquipmentEnergy <= 0 THEN
 PRINT "Error: IT Equipment Energy must be positive"
 RETURN -1
 END IF
 
 // Calculate PUE
 PUEValue = TotalFacilityEnergy / ITEquipmentEnergy
 
 // Evaluate efficiency
 IF PUEValue < 1.2 THEN
 PRINT "Highly Efficient Data Center"
 ELSE IF PUEValue < 1.5 THEN
 PRINT "Efficient Data Center"
 ELSE IF PUEValue < 2.0 THEN
 PRINT "Average Data Center"
 ELSE
 PRINT "Inefficient Data Center - Needs Improvement"
 END IF
 
 RETURN PUEValue
END
explanation: This algorithm calculates PUE by dividing total facility energy consumption by IT equipment energy consumption. A lower PUE indicates better energy efficiency. The algorithm also provides efficiency ratings based on the calculated value.

title: Carbon-Aware Task Scheduling
description: Algorithm to schedule computational tasks during low-carbon energy periods
code:
// Carbon-Aware Task Scheduling
ALGORITHM ScheduleTask
INPUT: TaskList, CarbonIntensitySchedule
OUTPUT: ScheduledTasks

BEGIN
 ScheduledTasks = EMPTY_LIST
 SortedTasks = SortByPriority(TaskList) // Highest priority first
 CurrentTimeSlot = GetCurrentTimeSlot()
 
 FOR EACH Task IN SortedTasks DO
 BestTimeSlot = -1
 LowestCarbon = INFINITY
 
 // Find time slot with lowest carbon intensity
 FOR i FROM CurrentTimeSlot TO MaxTimeSlot DO
 IF CarbonIntensitySchedule[i] < LowestCarbon THEN
 LowestCarbon = CarbonIntensitySchedule[i]
 BestTimeSlot = i
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 // Schedule task if deadline allows
 IF BestTimeSlot <= Task.Deadline THEN
 Schedule Task at BestTimeSlot
 Add Task to ScheduledTasks
 Update CarbonIntensitySchedule
 ELSE
 // Schedule immediately if deadline is critical
 IF Task.IsCritical THEN
 Schedule Task at CurrentTimeSlot
 Add Task to ScheduledTasks
 END IF
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 RETURN ScheduledTasks
END
explanation: This algorithm schedules computational tasks during periods of low carbon intensity, reducing the carbon footprint of computing operations. It prioritizes tasks and finds optimal time slots based on carbon intensity data from the electrical grid.
